# Go Green Scrap Pros — Website

Static HTML website for [gogreenscrappros.com](https://gogreenscrappros.com).

## Setup

Run once after cloning:

```bash
npm install
```

This installs `clean-css-cli`, which the pre-commit hook uses to minify CSS.

## CSS Workflow

**Never edit `assets/style.css` directly** — it is auto-generated and will be overwritten.

Edit `assets/source-style.css` instead. The pre-commit hook minifies it into `assets/style.css` automatically on every `git commit`.

To minify manually without committing:

```bash
npm run minify-css
```

## Page Generation

City + service pages (e.g. `mattress-removal-arvada/`) are generated by `generate_pages.py`:

```bash
python3 generate_pages.py
```

This produces 9 services × 7 cities = 63 pages. After running, commit the output normally — the pre-commit hook will handle CSS minification.

## Sitemap

`sitemap.xml` is maintained by hand. After adding new pages, add their URLs to the appropriate section in `sitemap.xml` and resubmit in Google Search Console.
